fundamentals.name: Snowflake Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Snowflake Inc. provides a cloud-based data platform for various organizations in the United States and internationally. The company's platform includes artificial intelligence (AI) Data Cloud, which enables customers to consolidate data into a single source of truth to drive meaningful business insights, build data applications, and share data and data products, as well as applies AI for solving business problems. It serves financial services, advertising, media and entertainment, retail and consumer goods, healthcare and life sciences, manufacturing, technology, telecom, travel and hospitality, and government and defense industries, as well as the public sector. the company has a collaboration with OpenAI, L.L.C. for the development of AI solutions for joint enterprise customers that deliver tangible return on investment. The company was formerly known as Snowflake Computing, Inc. and changed its name to Snowflake Inc. in April 2019. Snowflake Inc. was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Menlo Park, California.

judgment.summary: Snowflake shows strong revenue and free cash flow growth but is unprofitable on an operating and net basis with a high forward P/E.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 17.8%; next earnings date is 2026-05-27.
positives: Revenue growth 30.1% YoY — indicates strong market demand for its services.
Free cash flow (TTM) $1.59B — positive cash generation despite operating losses.
Analyst growth est, current FY 43.5% — significant expected future growth.
Mean analyst target $229.66 — implies substantial upside from current price.
negatives: Operating margin -33.2% and Profit margin -28.4% — the company is not profitable.
Forward P/E 68.30x — valuation is very high, pricing in substantial future growth.
Debt/Equity 142.46 — high leverage relative to equity.
Return on equity -53.9% and Return on assets -9.9% — poor returns on capital employed.

news.paragraph: Snowflake's stock price targets are being adjusted ahead of its upcoming earnings report, with analysts focusing on its potential AI turnaround. The company is expected to report its latest quarterly results on May 27th, following a recent beat on EPS in the prior quarter. Investors will be watching closely to see if the company can meet or exceed analyst growth estimates for the current quarter and fiscal year.
